title: Users may experience failures when enrolling Apple devices in Microsoft Intune
impact: Users may have experienced failures when enrolling Apple devices in Microsoft Intune.

updates.content:
Title: Users may experience failures when enrolling Apple devices in Microsoft Intune

User impact: Users may have experienced failures when enrolling Apple devices in Microsoft Intune.

Current status: We've investigated a problem in which users may have experienced failures when enrolling Apple devices in Microsoft Intune and confirmed that service is now restored. We'll provide additional information in a closure summary within the "History" section of the "Service health" dashboard shortly.

Title: Users may experience failures when enrolling Apple devices in Microsoft Intune

User impact: Users may have experienced failures when enrolling Apple devices in Microsoft Intune.

Final status: While we were in the process of analyzing the errors associated with this event, system monitoring indicated that the service had returned to normal health. We've confirmed that the issue is no longer occurring and we'll continue to monitor the service to ensure that the problem doesn't happen again.

Scope of impact: This event impacted users in North America, who may have experienced failures when enrolling Apple devices in Microsoft Intune.

Start time: Tuesday, May 5, 2026, at 7:00 PM UTC

End time: Tuesday, May 5, 2026, at 8:00 PM UTC

This is the final update for the event.
